title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: s390utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for s390utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The s390utils packages contain a set of user-space utilities that should be used together with the zSeries (s390) Linux kernel and device drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.4 - libekmfweb: Fix gen of cert or CSR to use RSA not RSA-PSS (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115828)  RHEL9.4 - chpstat: Fix DPU utilization scaling in reports (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115843)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for s390utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The s390utils packages contain a set of user-space utilities that should be used together with the zSeries (s390) Linux kernel and device drivers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.4 - libekmfweb: Fix gen of cert or CSR to use RSA not RSA-PSS (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115828)  RHEL9.4 - chpstat: Fix DPU utilization scaling in reports (s390utils/s390-tools) [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115843)
